overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The player navigates covered walkways, crosses busy intersections, and passes under elevated highways surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit line

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection area with colorful building facades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered sidewalk following a child in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: child in yellow jacket walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: dark building with large golden V logo on facade
massive concrete support pillars for elevated structure
enclosed walkway with multicolored glass panels spanning overhead
illuminated sign reading IT'S BIG on building facade
metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered urban walkway with massive concrete pillars and a colorful glass pedestrian bridge overhead. The player follows a child in a yellow jacket while neon signs illuminate the right side of the path. The segment ends as the covered area opens into a wider intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: futuristic vehicles pass through intersection as player approaches crosswalk
turns left at intersection and begins walking alongside moving traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk, then turning left to walk alongside traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
towering glass and steel buildings with neon pink and blue lighting
curved concrete overpass with vehicles traveling above
large illuminated advertisements on distant building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with a prominent yellow striped crosswalk. The player crosses the street amidst moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles, then turns left to walk along the road. Towering glass skyscrapers with neon lighting rise in the distance under the darkening dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with construction barriers

events.description: passes under massive concrete overpass structure entering sheltered walkway
waits for purple taxi to pass before continuing across side street

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway past construction barriers and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket standing near crosswalk edge

entered.detail: bright red neon sign for Brooklyn Barista coffee shop
white and orange temporary construction walls lining the walkway
distinctive yellow building with art deco styling and vertical windows
dark building facade with horizontal purple neon lighting strips

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete overpass structure with construction barriers lining the right side. The player passes the bright red neon 'Brooklyn Barista' sign and a distinctive yellow art deco building. The area is illuminated by artificial neon lighting as the sky is mostly obscured by the overhead highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with holographic advertisements

events.description: large holographic billboard displaying muscular figure becomes prominent focal point

agents.ego_description: walking down the pedestrian street toward a large holographic advertisement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisement displaying a muscular figure
metal pedestrian bridge spanning the street above
various commercial shops with neon signage including a green OPEN sign

segments.scene_description: The final stretch follows a commercial pedestrian street lined with storefronts and neon signs. The player approaches a massive holographic billboard floating above the street, passing under an overhead metal walkway. The environment transitions to a more open commercial district with various shops visible along the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into the expansive, neon-drenched commercial heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a covered path with massive concrete pillars and a colorful glass bridge, following a child in a yellow jacket past glowing signs before the space opens into a wide intersection. As the camera crosses a yellow striped crosswalk amidst futuristic traffic, the view expands to reveal towering glass skyscrapers rising into the darkening dusk sky. The scene then shifts beneath the heavy shadow of a concrete overpass, passing construction barriers and the bright red neon of the Brooklyn Barista near a yellow art deco building. Finally, the path leads onto a commercial pedestrian street, moving under a metal walkway and toward a massive floating holographic billboard as the environment opens into a vibrant district of storefronts.
